data.title: Intel's Q3 earnings beat expectations with revenue of $13.65B (est. $13.14B) and EPS of 23 cents (est. 1 cent); stock surges.
data.description: Intel Corp released their third-quarter financial results after the bell on Thursday. The company reported total revenue of $13.65 billion, surpassing analyst predictions of $13.14 billion. Intel also reported adjusted earnings of 23 cents per share, exceeding estimates of one cent per share. This marks a 3% increase in total revenue compared to the previous year. The Client Computing Group generated $8.5 billion in revenue during the quarter. INTC stock is exhibiting notable strength following the earnings report. For further details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: NAV CANADA posted strong financial results for 2025, investing in air navigation system. Key investments include iTEC SkyNex and a Digital Aerodrome Air Traffic Services facility in Kingston.
data.description: NAV CANADA announced its financial results for the year ending August 31, 2025. The company showcased strong financial performance despite the challenging aviation environment by prioritizing safety and investing in the future of Canada's air navigation system. Investments in staffing and training led to a decrease in service delivery risks and progress in long-term transformation plans. Notable achievements include the upcoming implementation of iTEC SkyNex, a pioneering technology in Canadian air traffic management, and the commencement of construction on the country's inaugural Digital Aerodrome Air Traffic Services facility in Kingston. The full report can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Changpeng Zhao, founder of Binance Exchange, pardoned by Trump despite money-laundering violations aiding criminals. Zhao is richest in crypto.
data.description: The wealthiest individual in the cryptocurrency industry, Changpeng Zhao, acknowledged committing money-laundering offenses that facilitated the transfer of funds for terrorists and other criminals through Binance.

data.title: Patti Engineering is now a Premier Ignition Integrator, the highest level in the program, showing excellence in Ignition projects.
data.description: Patti Engineering has been acknowledged as a Premier Ignition Integrator, the top certification level in the Inductive Automation Integrator Program. This status is obtained through a track record of showcasing proficiency in the platform and completing top-notch Ignition-based projects.

data.title: Zions Bancorporation CFO to present at BancAnalysts Association of Boston Conference on November 6 at 3:05 pm ET.
data.description: A financial officer from Zions Bancorporation (NASDAQ: ZION) will be speaking at the BancAnalysts Association of Boston Conference on November 6th at 3:05 pm ET. The event will take place at the Langham Hotel in Boston. The presentation will be broadcasted live via webcast.

data.title: Odyssey Resources grants 1,820,000 incentive stock options to directors and officers as part of long-term incentive plan.
data.description: In Toronto on October 21, 2025, Odyssey Resources Limited (NEX: ODX.H) disclosed the allocation of 1,820,000 incentive stock options to specific directors and officers. This distribution is part of the Company's share option plan aimed at supporting long-term incentives for key personnel.
An agreement worth billions confirmed as Anthropic to boost Google Cloud uses TPUs and services.

data.title: Cboe Global Markets declares $0.72 per share dividend for Q4 2025. Board of Directors announced.
data.description: Today, in Chicago, Cboe Global Markets, Inc. (Cboe: CBOE), a top derivatives and securities exchange network, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.72 per share of common stock for Q4 2025 as approved by its Board of Directors.

data.title: Hecla Mining (NYSE:HL) will report Q3 2025 results on Nov 5 after NYSE closes, with earnings call on Nov 6 at 10:00 am ET.
data.description: Hecla Mining Company (NYSE:HL) revealed that it is set to unveil its operational and financial results for the third quarter of 2025 following the closure of the New York Stock Exchange on November 5, 2025. The Company has scheduled a conference call and webcast for November 6, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. For more information and to access the webcast, visit https://events.q4inc.com/attendee/122593.

data.title: CVB Financial Corp. appoints Tim Stephens as Director, increasing board members from 8 to 9 for CVBF and Citizens Business Bank.
data.description: In a statement released on October 23, 2025, CVB Financial Corp. (CVBF) revealed the appointment of Tim Stephens as a Director. Stephens will also join the Board of Directors of Citizens Business Bank, increasing the total number of board members for both CVBF and the Bank from eight to nine. This change signifies a notable development within the company's leadership structure.

data.title: Dr. Lukasz Kowalczyk appointed as Executive Medical Director at Provation, bringing clinical, entrepreneurial, and AI expertise.
data.description: Provation has recently appointed Dr. Lukasz Kowalczyk as their Executive Medical Director. Dr. Kowalczyk is a prominent gastroenterologist and health tech innovator, and his addition brings a blend of clinical proficiency, entrepreneurial acumen, and AI guidance to Provation's mission of becoming a frontrunner in pioneering healthcare solutions. The company aims to enhance healthcare quality and efficiency globally. Dr. Kowalczyk's extensive expertise will play a crucial role in Provation's strategy moving forward.

data.title: Easterly Govt Properties (NYSE: DEA) approves $0.45 quarterly dividend. Shareholders of record on 11/20/25 will receive it.
data.description: In Washington, Easterly Government Properties, Inc. (NYSE: DEA), a real estate investment trust specializing in Class A commercial properties leased to the U.S. Government, has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.45 per common share. The dividend, approved by the Board of Directors, is set to be paid on November 20, 2025 to shareholders of record.

data.title: Eton Pharma (Nasdaq: ETON) to reveal Q3 2025 finances on Nov 6, 2025. Conference call at 4:30pm ET (3:30pm CT).
data.description: Eton Pharmaceuticals, Inc based in Deer Park, Illinois, will be revealing their financial performance for the third quarter of 2025 on November 6th. The company, traded on Nasdaq as ETON, specializes in creating and marketing therapies for uncommon illnesses. The announcement will be followed by a conference call and live webcast led by management at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time (3:30 p.m. Central Time).

data.title: BRIDGE Housing raises $175 million through bond issue, exceeding $150 million goal to address affordable housing crisis.
data.description: In San Francisco, BRIDGE Housing, a prominent nonprofit affordable housing provider in the Western United States, recently secured $175 million in taxable general obligation bonds after raising the initial offering amount to meet robust investor interest. Originally intending to issue $150 million in Taxable Bonds, Series 2025 (Social Bonds), BRIDGE Housing decided to expand the offering to support its efforts in addressing the affordability crisis in highly expensive housing markets across the country. The underwriting of the bonds was handled by Morgan Stanley, a significant financial institution.

data.title: Karman Space & Defense to release Q3 FY 2025 earnings. Conference call and webcast planned. #aerospace
data.description: The aerospace company, Karman Space & Defense, based in Huntington Beach, California, has announced the schedule for their third quarter fiscal year 2025 earnings release. The release will include a conference call and webcast for investors and analysts. No specific dates were mentioned in the announcement. Karman Space & Defense is expected to provide updates on their financial performance during this period. This news showcases the company's commitment to transparency and communication with stakeholders, aiming to provide important information regarding their financial health and strategic direction moving forward.

data.title: N-able to host Q3 earnings call on Nov 6, 2025 at 8:30 am ET. Visit http://investors.n-able.com for webcast. Replay available post-event.
data.description: BURLINGTON, Mass.-- N-able, Inc., a leading software company traded on NYSE under the ticker NABL, has revealed plans to hold a conference call to evaluate its financial performance for Q3 of 2025 at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on November 6, 2025. Those keen on tuning in can access a live webcast of the call via the N-able Investor Relations site at http://investors.n-able.com. Additionally, a replay option will be available temporarily post the event for those unable to listen live.

data.title: Cenovus Energy Inc. will report Q3 2025 results on Oct 31, financial statements available on their website.
data.description: Cenovus Energy Inc. is set to announce its third-quarter 2025 results on October 31, 2025, in Calgary, Alberta. The report will include comprehensive operational and financial data for the quarter. Stakeholders can access the company's financial statements on their official website, cenovus.com. Cenovus Energy Inc. trades under the symbols TSX:CVE and NYSE:CVE on the Toronto and New York stock exchanges respectively.

data.title: Grindr (NYSE: GRND) will release Q3 2025 financial results on Nov 6, 2025, after the market closes. Webcasted conference call to follow.
data.description: Los Angeles-based Grindr Inc. (NYSE: GRND) will be unveiling its financial performance for the third quarter ending September 30, 2025, after trading hours on November 6, 2025. The company, known as the Global Gayborhood in Your Pocket™, will provide detailed information in a press release available on its Investor Relations website at https://investors.grindr.com. A webcasted conference call will also be conducted following the release, offering an opportunity for investors to delve into the results further.

data.title: Cable One to host conference call on Nov 6, 2025 to discuss Q3 results; call available at ir.cableone.net or 1-888-800-3155.
data.description: Phoenix-based Cable One, Inc. (NYSE: CABO) is set to hold a conference call on November 6, 2025, at 5 p.m. Eastern Time to discuss its third-quarter 2025 results. The company will release its financial results after the market closes on the same day. Interested parties can access the conference call through a live audio webcast on the Cable One Investor Relations website at ir.cableone.net or by dialing 1-888-800-3155 (International: 1-XXX-XXX-XXXX).

data.title: Sprinklr announces 2025 CXUnifier Award winners for outstanding customer experiences; promotes brand commitment to CX.
data.description: In New York, Sprinklr, a Unified-CXM platform for enterprises, revealed the 2025 CXUnifier Award recipients. This annual accolade recognizes individuals and companies for their dedication to providing exceptional customer experiences. Sprinklr's President and CEO, Rory Read, praised the winners for showcasing the impact of prioritizing customer experience as a core strategy. The awards highlight those who excel in delivering outstanding experiences across all customer interactions. This event underscores the importance of fostering strong customer relationships.
